currentWorkspace.title: Current Workspace
currentWorkspace.description: The active team handover workspace containing rotational status, current tasks, aging backlog items, history logs, and sign-off validations.

outgoingLead.description: The person currently ending their shifts/lead cycle

incomingLead.description: The counterpart taking over the next lead cycle

status.description: The transition status of the shift handover

latestLog.description: Text notes or details about the shift handover

tasks.description: Current active cycle tasks to complete or transition

backlog.description: Stale or older unresolved backlog tasks with tracking timestamps

history.description: Historical records of previous digital sign-offs

handoverSystem/{workspaceId}.description: A dynamic team handover workspace document containing rotational status, current tasks, aging backlog items, history logs, and sign-off validations.
